2340340.name: 【DLC】恋来い温泉物語 Non-VR Edition
2340340.description:
[About Koi-Koi VR: Love Blossoms]

"Koi-Koi: Love Blossoms Non-VR Edition" can now be played without VR!
Become the protagonist in a romance adventure game!
Enjoy a life full of excitement with two charming sisters at a hot spring resort!

Notes for downloading

・This download content is only available to purchasers of "Koi-Koi VR: Love Blossoms".

・There is no difference in game content between 'Koi-Koi VR: Love Blossoms', 'Koi-Koi: Love Blossoms Non-VR Edition', and '【DLC】Koi-Koi: Love Blossoms Non-VR Edition'.
2340340.supported_languages:
日语*, 英语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
